short_description.value: SkySenseGPT is a Remote Sensing Large Multi-Modal Model (RSLMM) instruction-tuned on the large-scale FIT-RS dataset for fine-grained vision-language understanding, including complex relation reasoning and scene graph generation in remote sensing imagery.

pretraining.value: Instruction tuning on FIT-RS (1.8M samples) and additional public datasets (scene classification, VQA, object detection, image caption, multi-turn conversation).

value.value: completeness threshold (iof) 0.3 for image caption, 0.55 for other tasks
